Introduction

This document describes the Atlas project. Atlas is a distributed data platform designed for real-time analytics.

Architecture

Atlas uses a microservices architecture with three main components.

Risk Assessment Report

The following risks have been identified:
1. Supply chain delays
2. Data anonymization incomplete
3. Budget overrun potential

Chapter 1: Background
The project was initiated in 2024.

Chapter 2: Methods
We used quantitative analysis.

Chapter 3: Results
Key findings include improved latency.

API Reference

GET /users - List all users
POST /users - Create user
DELETE /users/:id - Delete user
